title: BG Electrical 3-Pole Fan Isolator Switch
features: SLEEK AND SLIM ELECTRICAL FAN ISOLATOR SWITCH: 10A switch providing a safe method of isolating fan units. Triple pole switching design however can be used for double pole applications if required
PART OF THE NEXUS METAL RANGE: From BG Electrical, has softly rounded corners, and a slim profile – combining quality with modern elegance
INTEGRATED MOISTURE GASKET CONTROL: Protects the metal edges from tarnishing. Ideal when using new plaster. No visible plastic around the switch

CAPTIVE BACKED-OUT TERMINAL SCREWS: Easy wire connection and terminal screws for fast installation and to prevent screw loss. All fixings included. Adheres to BS60669-1 regulations which ensures a safer electrical installation
BG ELECTRICAL 25 YEARS MANUFACTURER'S WARRANTY: They guarantee against faulty materials and workmanship for 25 years – giving you total peace of mind
description: From the manufacturer BG Electrical Brushed Steel Fan Isolator Switch, Rounded Plate, 10AX This sleek and stylish fan isolator switch from the BG Electrical Nexus range at Luceco, provides a safe and simple method of isolating mechanical fan units, when repairing and carrying out maintenance. With its rounded edge finish, the brushed steel wall plate will seamlessly fit with any style or décor. More Information 10 Amp, 10AX inductive rated 3-Pole Captive terminal screws Terminal capacity 4 x 1.0mm, 4 x 1.5mm, 2 x 2.5mm, 1 x 4.0mm Plate-switches manufactured to BS EN 60669-1 Features Colour coded Captive Screw Terminals Clearly guided on the inside of the front wall plate, are conveniently angled in-line colour coded backed out captive screw terminals, so you can confidently install and wire the light switch yourself. Clean and modern design With brushed steel colour matching fixing screws, the fan isolator switch, has a clean and modern look, allowing it to complement your home and interiors. Stylish and sleek The wall plates have a fixed integrated plastic gasket to protect metal edges from moisture, so you won’t see any visible plastic around the switches. You can touch this The wall plates have a lightly lacquered surface to reduce fingerprint marks, so you can maintain the sleek and stylish look of the brushed steel with minimum to no effort!
